steps.title: Match the area factors
steps.content:
The area of a rectangle is length times width. The given area model is:
\[
y=(87w)(w)
\]
One factor is \(w\), which represents the width in feet.

steps.title: Interpret the other factor
steps.content: The rectangle's length is \(87\) times its width, so if the width is \(w\), the length is: \[ 87w \] That means \(87w\) is not the area, not the width, and not the difference between the length and width. It represents the length of the rectangle, in feet. The answer is A.
